summary: Comprehensive testing of JD Builder new features: chunked file upload, edit mode, download dropdown (docx/pdf/txt). Backend: 11/11 tests pass after fixing PDF generation crash. Frontend: All 18 feature scenarios verified. One critical backend bug found and fixed (PDF crash). One minor UI rendering issue noted.

critical.issue: FIXED: fpdf.errors.FPDFException: 'Not enough horizontal space to render a single character' when rendering bullet points. Root cause: pdf.cell(5) + pdf.multi_cell(0,...) incompatible in fpdf2 v2.8.6. Fixed by replacing pdf.cell(5) with pdf.set_x(pdf.l_margin + 5) in _parse_md_to_pdf.

issues: The renderMarkdown function does not handle '---' (horizontal rule/divider). AI-generated content that uses '---' as a separator renders as literal text '---' instead of a visual separator. Should add: if (line.trim() === '---') return <hr key={i} className="border-white/10 my-3" />;

action_items: Minor: Add '---' horizontal rule support in AITools.js renderMarkdown function (line 176 area): if (line.trim() === '---') return <hr key={i} className='border-white/10 my-3' />
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: PDF download endpoint crashed with fpdf2 v2.8.6 due to pdf.cell(5) advancing X position before multi_cell(0,...) - now uses pdf.set_x(pdf.l_margin + 5) for bullet indentation
Minor: renderMarkdown doesn't handle '---' (markdown HR) - shows as literal text in formatted output
The file upload progress bar works correctly but may not be visible for small files (<1MB = 1 chunk) since they complete instantly - this is expected
Chunked upload (1MB chunks) properly assembles and extracts text for .txt files - tested and working
All 3 download formats (txt, docx, pdf) generate valid files with correct headers and magic bytes (PK for docx, %PDF for pdf)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing account saba@bestpl.ai for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All JD Builder features working: file upload (chunked, .txt tested), edit mode (edit/save/cancel), download dropdown (Word/PDF/txt). PDF download was crashing (FIXED in this iteration). Other tools (search-strategy, candidate-research, dossier, client-research) correctly DO NOT show file upload zone. Test credentials: saba@bestpl.ai / Bestpl2026!. Nav link testid: nav-link-ai-tools. Note: AI generation can take up to 60s, use timeout=60000 for wait_for_selector on ai-result.

rca_of_issue.bug: POST /api/ai/download with format=pdf returned HTTP 500 (Cloudflare proxied as 520)
rca_of_issue.root_cause: In fpdf2 v2.8.6, calling pdf.cell(5) followed immediately by pdf.multi_cell(0, 5.5, ...) is incompatible. pdf.cell(5) advances the X cursor by 5mm, and then multi_cell(w=0) uses 'w = self.w - self.r_margin - self.x' which should give ~165mm. However, in fpdf2 v2.8.x, this combination raises FPDFException 'Not enough horizontal space to render a single character'.
rca_of_issue.fix: Replaced pdf.cell(5) with pdf.set_x(pdf.l_margin + 5) to properly position X for indentation before multi_cell call
rca_of_issue.reproduction: POST /api/ai/download with content containing bullet points ('- item' or '* item') and format='pdf'
